citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 1:30 PM on
4/21/2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on the facility door, calling the phone number on
file, and speaking with a resident of the facility that stated the licensee was unavailable for inspection. Failure to provide
access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to
provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
Additional Inspectors:
Jonathan Tomkovitch, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICEREnd Section

narrative:
2.126(b)  Repeat

Additional Inspectors:
